Sr. Production Merchandiser (Knit) : A 100% compliance knit garments factory Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List A 100% compliance knit garments factory Sr. Production Merchandiser (Knit) Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 28 to 38 years Location: Gazipur (Sreepur) Salary: Tk. 40000 - 50000 (Monthly) Published: 04 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 28 to 38 years Only Male Applicants with proven working experience with buyer “kappahl” will get priority. Responsibilities & Context We are looking for Sr. Production Merchandiser (Knit) for our knit garments factory at Sreepur (Gazipur). Key responsibilities: 1)      Coordinate with Production, IE, and Planning team to ensure on-time order execution. 2)      Handle buyer comments, approvals, and changes during production. 3)      Ensure all buyer requirements are clearly communicated to internal teams. 4)      Ensure timely sourcing and in-house of fabric and trims. 5)      Coordinate with QA/QC team to maintain buyer quality standards. Skills & Expertise Merchandising Merchandising and Production. Knitwear Merchandising Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill,Weekly 2 holidays,Performance bonus Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Online And Social Media Executive : Four Star Cargo Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Four Star Cargo Online And Social Media Executive Application Deadline : 15 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: At least 22 years Location: Anywhere in Bangladesh Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Experience Additional Requirements Age At least 22 years Only Male Responsibilities & Context Job Summary We are looking for a creative and responsible Facebook Page Moderator to manage our company’s social media presence. The candidate will be responsible for handling Facebook page activities including content creation, customer communication, live sessions, and maintaining a professional online presence to promote the company’s services and products. Key Responsibilities Manage and monitor the company’s Facebook page and social media accounts . Reply to customer messages, comments, and inquiries in a professional and timely manner. Design banners, promotional posts, and social media graphics . Create and edit short promotional videos and reels for marketing purposes. Plan and conduct Facebook Live sessions to promote products/services and engage with customers. Post regular updates, offers, and promotional content on the page. Maintain proper customer communication and follow-up through Messenger and comments. Monitor page performance and increase engagement, followers, and reach . Coordinate with the marketing or management team for campaigns and promotions . Ensure all content reflects the company’s brand image and professionalism . Report weekly or monthly social media performance and activities to management. Stay updated with Facebook trends, algorithms, and digital marketing strategies . Skills & Requirements Experience in Facebook Page Management / Social Media Marketing . Basic skills in graphic design (Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools) . Ability to create and edit simple videos for social media. Good communication and writing skills (Bangla & basic English). Confident in hosting or participating in Facebook Live sessions . Creative mindset for content ideas and promotions . Basic knowledge of digital marketing and audience engagement . Ability to respond to customers politely and professionally . Self-motivated and able to work independently. Preferred Qualification Diploma / Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or any field . Previous experience in social media management or online business page handling will be an advantage. Previous experience working with shipping, logistics, or export-import industry will be considered an advantage. Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 Workplace Work at office Emplo

job_description: Full Stack Software Engineer - React And .Net : Bluebay IT Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Bluebay IT Limited Full Stack Software Engineer - React And .Net Application Deadline : 18 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 02 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 08 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Required Skills Backend Development Strong knowledge of C# and .NET Core Hands-on experience with ABP Framework REST API development Authentication & Authorization (JWT, OAuth) Frontend Development Strong experience with React.js Experience with Next.js HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript Responsive UI development Architecture & Design Solid understanding of Clean Architecture Knowledge of SOLID principles Experience with layered and modular systems AI & Modern Tools Experience with AI tools and frameworks Working knowledge of LangChain Familiarity with LangGraph Experience using LLMs (OpenAI, DeepSeek, etc.) Prompt engineering and AI workflow design DevOps & Deployment Experience with Docker & Docker Compose Basic to intermediate DevOps knowledge CI/CD pipelines Cloud deployment (Azure / AWS is a plus) Nice to Have Experience with microservices architecture Knowledge of Elasticsearch / Vector Databases Experience with Kubernetes Must work with ABP SaaS / Multi-Tenancy Experience with RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems Responsibilities & Context We are looking for a skilled Full-Stack Developer who has strong experience in .NET technologies, modern frontend frameworks, and AI tools. The ideal candidate should understand clean coding principles, scalable architecture, and DevOps practices. Experience with AI frameworks and cloud-ready applications is a big plus. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend APIs using .NET Work with ABP Framework for modular and scalable applications Build modern UI using React.js and Next.js Follow Clean Architecture and best coding practices Design and manage database structures Integrate AI features into applications Work with Docker for containerized applications Assist in CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tasks Collaborate with product managers and other developers Write clean, reusable, and well-documented code Skills & Expertise Suggested by Information technology Next.js ReactJS Software Development Software Implementation Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka Company Information Bluebay IT Limited Follow Address: House: 250/6, Road: 06, Smriti Dhara, Sonir Akhra, Jatra Bari, Dhaka-1236 Business: To Develop customize Software for client and own application Report this Job / Company (রিপোর্ট) রিপোর্ট এই চাকরির জন্য বিজ্ঞাপনদাতা ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠান আপনার কাছ থেকে কোন অর্থ চাইলে কিংবা নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া চলাকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানিমূল

Manager, Consumer & Market Insights : Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Manager, Consumer & Market Insights Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 01 Age: 30 to 40 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 08 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 30 to 40 years Responsibilities & Context Lead the design and execution of consumer, shopper, and market research studies. Develop deep understanding of consumer behavior, motivations, and purchase journeys across key categories. Translate research findings into clear, actionable insights for business teams. Provide insight-driven recommendations to support brand strategy, innovation, and communication development. Partner with Brand and Marketing teams to guide product development and positioning through consumer understanding. Support category growth strategies through market analysis and trend identification. Manage both qualitative and quantitative research projects including concept testing, product testing, U&A studies, brand health tracking, and segmentation studies. Integrate multiple data sources (consumer research, retail audit, sales data, digital analytics) to develop holistic insights. Ensure research methodologies and analysis meet global best practices. Monitor emerging consumer trends, cultural shifts, and category dynamics relevant to the Consumer Brands portfolio. Provide periodic insight reports to leadership highlighting opportunities and risks. Work closely with cross-functional teams including Marketing, Sales, Trade Marketing, Supply Chain, and Innovation. Present insights and strategic recommendations to senior leadership in a clear and compelling manner. Manage relationships with research agencies and data partners. Ensure research quality, cost efficiency, and timely delivery of insights. Skills & Expertise Communication Data Analytics Market Analysis Market/ Consumer Research Suggested by Analytical Skill Business Growth Data Management Compensation & Other Benefits T/A,Provident fund,Tour allowance,Medical allowance,Mobile bill,Weekly 2 holidays,Performance bonus,Insurance,Profit share,Gratuity Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka Company Information Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Follow More jobs from this company Address: ACI Centre, 245 Tejgaon Industrial Area, Dhaka-1208. Business: Pharmaceuticals; Agribusiness; Consumer Brands. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements প্রার্থীগণকে অবশ্যই অধূমপায়ী হতে হবে। সুপ্রতিষ্ঠিত ফিড কোম্পানির মার্কেটিং বিভাগে ২-৩ বছরের অভিজ্ঞতা সম্পন্ন। Responsibilities & Context এগ্রো ইন্ডাস্ট্রিয়াল ট্রাস্ট (এ.আই.টি) ১৯৮৮ইং সাল থেকে দেশের ফিড সেক্টরে একটি ঐতিহ্যবাহী ও সুপ্রতিষ্ঠিত নাম এবং পথিকৃৎ শিল্প প্রতিষ্ঠান। উক্ত প্রতিষ্ঠানে নিম্নলিখিত পদে আগ্রহী প্রার্থীদের দরখাস্ত আহবান করা হচ্ছে। স্টেশন- হেডঅফিস ও রাজশাহী Skills & Expertise Suggested by Sales & Marketing Sales Target Achievement Consumer Durables - Sales & Marketing Compensation & Other Benefits উপযুক্ত প্রার্থীকে আকর্ষনীয় বেতন ও ভাতাদি প্রদান করা হবে। Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka, Rajshahi Apply Procedure Hard Copy আগ্রহী প্রার্থীকে আবেদনপত্রের সহিত পূর্ণাঙ্গ জীবন বৃত্তান্ত (ফোন নং সহ), ০২ কপি ছবি, জাতীয় পরিচয় পত্রের ফটোকপি, সকল শিক্ষাগত যোগ্যতা ও অভিজ্ঞতার সনদসহ দরখাস্ত আগামী ৩১-০৩-২৬ইং তারিখের মধ্যে নিম্ন ঠিকানায় পাঠাতে হবে। উল্লেখ্য যে, বাছাইকৃত প্রার্থীদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করা হবে। সেক্রেটারি এগ্রো ইন্ডাস্ট্রিয়াল ট্রাস্ট (এ.আই.টি) আফজা টাওয়ার, ২৭/এফ মনিপুরীপাড়া (৪র্থ তলা), সংসদ এভিনিউ, তেজগাঁও, ঢাকা-১২১৫। E-mail: ait.hrd1989@gmail.com Company Information Agro Industrial Trust (AIT) Follow Address: Secretary, AGRO INDUSTRIAL TRUST (AIT), Afza Tower, 27/F (3rd Floor), Monipuripara, Sangsad Bhaban Avenue, Tejgaon, Dhaka-1215, Bangladesh. Oversee sales of company’s products and services Develop and manage the company’s marketing programs, including implementing marketing plans and budgets Develop sales action plans for new and existing clients based on market needs and business objectives Develop and execute marketing and sales plans and strategies, including creating and updating marketing and sales plans, setting marketing budgets, monitoring performance, and developing and designing marketing materials for web and print Design and implement a strategic business plan that expands the company’s customer base. job_title: Executive / Senior Executive - Civil Engineer ( Interior & Architectural Project)
job_description: Executive / Senior Executive - Civil Engineer ( Interior & Architectural Project) : THINK Architect Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List THINK Architect Executive / Senior Executive - Civil Engineer ( Interior & Architectural Project) Application Deadline : 21 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 3 Age: 20 to 40 years Location: Dhaka (Mirpur 14) Salary: Tk. 18000 - 35000 (Monthly) Published: 11 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 20 to 40 years Only Male Minimum 2–5 years of professional experience in interior site execution. Strong command over interior finishing, materials, carpentry, electrical, and plumbing works. Ability to interpret architectural and technical drawings. Excellent communication and leadership skills. Must be proactive, responsible, and solution-oriented. Willingness to travel to multiple project locations as needed. Responsibilities & Context Think Architect is an internationally recognized design and execution studio specializing in residential, commercial, hospitality, retail, healthcare, and beauty-sector projects. We combine creative design thinking with strong technical execution to deliver spaces that are aesthetic, functional, and built with precision. We are now expanding our execution department and looking for a Senior Site Engineer who can lead, manage, and elevate project quality. This is a full-time, on-site leadership position. We are looking for someone who understands construction execution at a professional level, ensures that design intent is followed precisely, manages complex site workflows, and leads the project team confidently. Key Responsibilities Site Management & Leadership Oversee and manage multiple sites simultaneously. Lead site supervisors, contractors, and labor teams to maintain workflow efficiency. Ensure all work is completed according to approved drawings, materials, and quality standards. Plan weekly schedules and monitor work progress against project timelines. Identify risks or delays and implement corrective actions immediately. Technical Expertise & Quality Control Review architectural, structural, and interior detail drawings thoroughly. Ensure accurate measurements, alignment, and finishing quality. Validate BOQ items, consumption, and wastage control. Resolve technical and execution challenges through coordination with the design team. Conduct on-site quality checks for materials, carpentry, electrical, plumbing, and finishing work. Client & Team Coordination Attend client meetings and site handovers. Communicate project status, requirements, and issues clearly and professionally. Ensure client feedback is addressed precisely and implemented correctly. Work closely with architects, 3D designers, project managers, and vendors. Document
